flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at SUNY Broome Community College rose 36% between 2021 and 2024 ($6.3k → $8.6k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at SUNY Broome Community College rose 25% between 2021 and 2024 ($11.4k → $14.3k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at SUNY Broome Community College fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (3.4k → 3.1k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 6 pp at SUNY Broome Community College vs the 2003–2007 baseline (22.9% vs 29.1%).
